# Notable Jot programs from Hemann & Holk, "Visualizing the Turing Tarpit"
# (data: github.com/tarpit/jot-code).  Translate to combinator dumps with
#   python3 iota/jot.py catalog iota-examples/tarpit/jot-programs.txt
# name              spec                  (int:N = Goedel number; bits:... = binary string)
Jot.longest_term    int:556550            # longest terminating in the first 2^20 (1433 beta-steps, applicative order)
Jot.aoloop_288752   int:288752            # paper's applicative-order non-terminating cluster (halts under our weak-NF reducer)
Jot.aoloop_577504   int:577504
Jot.elf_true        bits:
